title: Streak Tracking Improvements
description: Enhanced Inbox Zero tracking now remembers your best streaks and helps you stay motivated by tracking when streaks break.
features: Improved Inbox Zero streak tracking now remembers your longest streak and tracks streak breaks
fixes: Fixed crash when adding NOX contact

title: Smarter Conversation Selection
description: Conversations now intelligently auto-select when you switch tabs or filters, so you never see an empty screen.
features: Conversations now auto-select when switching tabs or changing filters—no more empty screens
fixes: Fixed crash when switching between conversations
Fixed duplicate messages appearing when sharing links
Fixed image message bubble layout issues
Fixed UI elements shifting during reply generation
Improved scrolling performance and reduced CPU usage
Fixed several crashes caused by concurrent operations

features: New experimental 'Waiting On' feature to see conversations where you're waiting for a response
Improved Demo Mode with guided walkthrough and better visual indicators
Background reply pre-generation for faster response times when switching conversations
Keyboard simulation improvements for the floating window with escape-to-cancel support
fixes: Fixed iMessage overlay appearing after free message limit was reached
Improved app responsiveness by optimizing contacts loading
Fixed crash during onboarding animation on some displays
Fixed various conversation list UI issues

features: Filter conversations by messaging service, time range, and sort order from a new dropdown menu
Support for new iMessage group chat format
What's New screen displays release notes after each update
Loading indicator when generating AI replies
Upgraded to Claude Sonnet 4.5 for improved reply quality
fixes: Removed confusing "Last Sync" timestamp from the home screen
Fixed AI-generated replies containing formatting issues
Stats overlay on iMessage now shows only iMessage conversation counts
Improved app launch performance

title: Smarter AI & Lightning-Fast Performance
description: RPLY just got a major brain upgrade! We've switched to Claude Sonnet 4.5 for significantly better AI-generated replies that sound more natural and helpful. Plus, the app now launches faster than ever, getting you to your conversations in a fraction of the time.
features: Upgraded to Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI model for higher-quality, more natural message suggestions
Added a loading indicator so you know exactly when AI replies are being generated
Dramatically faster app launch—your conversations appear almost instantly
fixes: Fixed AI replies containing unwanted formatting and line breaks
iMessage stats panel now correctly shows only iMessage conversation counts (not all platforms)
Improved analytics tracking for better app insights

title: Better Insights, Smoother Experience
description: Dive deeper into your messaging patterns with the new expandable Friends Graph that shows more contacts in a dedicated window. We've also fixed issues that were causing duplicate messages on iOS and made the app icon look pixel-perfect on macOS Sonoma.
features: Friends Graph now opens in a resizable window showing your top 10 most-messaged contacts with improved performance
Enhanced chart tooltips that follow your cursor for easier reading
fixes: Fixed duplicate messages being sent from conversation cards on iOS
App icon now displays at the correct size in the Dock and System Settings on macOS Sonoma

title: Smoother, Faster, More Reliable
description: This release focuses on polish and performance. We've fixed several bugs affecting contact names in onboarding, improved reply generation reliability, and made the app significantly more responsive with single-click editing and better keyboard navigation. Plus, we've eliminated performance issues that were draining your battery.
features: Single-click now focuses the reply composer instantly—no more double-clicking to start typing
Double-click any conversation to expand it, plus improved keyboard navigation with consistent Escape key behavior
Dramatically reduced CPU usage by fixing an animation issue that was constantly using processing power in the background
fixes: Fixed missing contact names and photos during onboarding and throughout the app
Reply generation progress indicator now disappears properly when AI replies fail
Resolved issue where very long messages (3,200+ characters) would cause the app to get stuck processing embeddings
Fixed bug where the reply composer could show a permanent loading state

title: Smoother, Faster, More Reliable Messaging
description: This release is all about polish and performance. We've dramatically improved scrolling smoothness, fixed animation jank when viewing expanded messages, and made RPLY better at detecting your contact information. Plus, several pesky bugs that affected keyboard navigation and message syncing are now history.
features: Silky-smooth scrolling through conversations with optimized hover effects that no longer cause lag
Buttery animations when expanding messages with improved visual transitions and no more flickering
Smarter detection of your phone numbers and email addresses for better account matching
fixes: Fixed arrow key navigation not working after closing message details
Resolved sync issues where conversations wouldn't update properly
Eliminated race conditions that could cause dismissed messages to reappear

title: Smoother, Faster, More Beautiful
description: This release brings major performance improvements across the board, making RPLY feel incredibly smooth and responsive. We've redesigned the iOS home screen with an interactive background and better navigation, fixed onboarding animations that felt choppy, and made scrolling through your conversations buttery smooth—even with thousands of messages.
features: Redesigned iOS home screen with interactive background that responds to scrolling and new time window filters
Beautiful new loading states and refined inbox zero screen with clearer calls-to-action
Smooth floating window animations in iMessage that fade in gracefully instead of popping abruptly
Improved disconnected error state with helpful instructions and download link positioned at the top
fixes: Fixed conversation list scrolling performance—now silky smooth even with 1,000+ conversations
Resolved stuttering onboarding animations on macOS for the animated orb and graph effects
Improved expanded message close button and tap-to-dismiss interactions
Fixed minor hang warning caused by 3D text animations
Enhanced privacy by removing potentially sensitive information from analytics events

title: Privacy, Performance & Polish
description: This release doubles down on your privacy and app performance. We've strengthened privacy controls during onboarding, dramatically improved iMessage floating window responsiveness, and eliminated unnecessary background processes. RPLY now feels faster and respects your privacy choices from the moment you start using it.
features: Enhanced app update experience with improved visual feedback
Smarter AI model switching that only syncs when needed, saving battery and resources
fixes: Conversations now update properly without requiring manual refreshes
Maximum Privacy setting is now fully enforced during onboarding—no analytics data is sent when you choose this option
iMessage floating windows move smoothly without stuttering or lag
Improved security for API credentials with better protection
Cleaner AI responses without unnecessary meta-commentary

title: Media Viewer & Stability Boost
description: We've made viewing your photos and videos easier than ever! Double-click any image or video in your conversations to open it in a full, distraction-free viewer. Plus, we've squashed several bugs to make RPLY more stable and reliable.
features: Double-click images and videos to open them in a dedicated full-screen viewer for better focus and clarity
fixes: Fixed app crashes that could occur when scrolling through conversations
Resolved an issue where duplicate NOX contacts could appear in your contact list
Improved overall app performance and stability

title: Enhanced Contact System & Performance Boost
description: We've upgraded RPLY's contact system to give you more flexibility in how you connect with others. This release includes important behind-the-scenes improvements that make the app faster and more reliable for everyone.
features: You can now find and message contacts using their phone numbers, not just email addresses
fixes: Resolved messaging issues that could prevent chats from loading properly
Streamlined the app by removing outdated code for a smoother, faster experience

title: Faster Launch & Rock-Solid Stability
description: We've supercharged RPLY's startup speed and squashed several critical crashes that were affecting the onboarding experience and daily use. This release is all about making your messaging experience smoother and more reliable from the moment you open the app.
features: Significantly faster app launch times with optimized startup performance
fixes: Fixed a crash that occurred during onboarding when viewing the reply tutorial
Resolved multiple crash issues affecting sidebar navigation and message interactions
Fixed a stability issue that could cause crashes when dismissing conversations
Improved overall app stability with better memory management across the interface

title: Reactions on Mac, Performance Boost & Better Sync
description: This release brings native tapback reactions to macOS—now you can react to messages with hearts, thumbs up, and custom emoji just like on iOS! We've also dramatically reduced CPU usage for a snappier experience and fixed several CloudKit sync issues to keep your messages flowing smoothly.
features: React to messages on macOS with hearts, thumbs up/down, laughs, and custom emoji—fully synced with iMessage
Dismiss chats individually from the 'No response needed' section instead of only dismissing all at once
AI responses now include temporal awareness for more contextually relevant replies
fixes: Massively reduced CPU usage by optimizing menu bar button and limiting shimmer animations
Fixed CloudKit message sync creating false conflicts and duplicate uploads
Fixed subscription attribution and referral codes not working properly on Mac
Fixed send button icon being invisible on iOS
Fixed group chats not opening properly from Messages and conversation view loading issues
Fixed repo setup issues for new developers

title: Faster, Smoother, More Reliable
description: This release is all about performance and polish. We've dramatically improved build times for our team (10x faster!), fixed message streaming to handle bursts smoothly, and added delightful daily backgrounds when you reach inbox zero. Plus, we've made syncing more reliable and squashed some pesky bugs.
features: New daily background images appear when you reach inbox zero—a fresh look every day of the month
Share message content directly from iOS with the new share UI
Enhanced onboarding experience with animated contact orbits
fixes: Significantly improved performance when receiving multiple messages at once—no more lag during message bursts
Fixed CloudKit syncing to start automatically and keep your conversations up to date
Resolved session verification errors that could occur after purchase
iMessage contacts now sync properly every time you launch the app

title: Calendar Sharing & Stability Improvements
description: We've added the ability to automatically send calendar events in your messages, making it easier to coordinate and share schedules. This release also includes important reliability improvements and better crash reporting to help us keep RPLY running smoothly.
features: Auto-send calendar events in your conversations for seamless scheduling
Improved crash reporting to help us fix issues faster
fixes: Fixed cursor popup flickering when hovering quickly over messages
Resolved issue where the floating window wouldn't follow your active conversation
Improved app stability and performance under the hood

title: Smoother Typing & Smarter Conversations
description: We've made typing feel more natural and your conversation list cleaner. This update fixes annoying text editing quirks and intelligently filters out conversations you don't need to see, so you can focus on what matters most.
features: Smarter conversation filtering automatically hides empty chats and messages you've sent
Improved device connectivity monitoring keeps you better connected across all your devices
fixes: Fixed text jumping and disappearing spaces while typing messages
Fixed app icon issues that could prevent iOS app updates
Resolved settings sync issues when making changes on multiple devices at once

title: Stability Fix: Smoother Messaging Experience
description: We've squashed a pesky bug that could cause the app to crash when receiving rapid notifications. This update ensures RPLY stays stable and responsive, even during your busiest conversations.
fixes: Fixed app crashes caused by receiving multiple notifications in quick succession

title: Smoother, Faster, and More Reliable
description: This release brings major performance upgrades and stability improvements across the board. We've supercharged message loading speeds, polished the Portal UI with better animations and keyboard shortcuts, and made WhatsApp integration more reliable with smart auto-reconnection. Plus, we've squashed dozens of bugs to make RPLY feel snappier than ever.
features: Lightning-fast message loading with improved conversation history performance
Enhanced Portal UI with better keyboard shortcuts (Esc, Return) and smoother send animations
WhatsApp auto-reconnection that intelligently handles network issues
New multi-reply interface lets you respond to multiple messages at once
Arrow key navigation in Portal grid view for faster browsing
Contact trends and statistics views with beautiful friend charts and person highlighting
Improved onboarding experience with new welcome screens and reliability upgrades
Group chat support for WhatsApp via Accessibility API
Per-contact and global formatting preferences for personalized replies
Proactive calendar event detection with better date parsing
fixes: Fixed code signing issues that could break the app for users with special characters in their names
Resolved conversation history sometimes appearing empty
Fixed search button not working due to layout issues
Prevented stale UI callbacks from truncating streaming replies
Fixed action buttons and reply section being invisible in expanded Portal view
Eliminated duplicate incoming messages
Resolved app becoming unresponsive for extended periods
Fixed WhatsApp messages not being received and dismissed conversations staying hidden
Improved streaming reply text updates to prevent UI jitter
Fixed group chats not loading in initial data fetch
Resolved fatal errors on desktop Macs related to battery monitoring
Fixed RPLY icon randomly disappearing from menu bar
Prevented crashes when scrolling in Portal UI
Fixed WhatsApp service crashes during onboarding and decryption errors
Improved analytics reliability for tracking user engagement

title: Faster, Smoother, More Reliable
description: We've supercharged RPLY with major performance improvements that make the app load faster and feel more responsive. This release also brings new statistics to help you understand your messaging habits, plus dozens of fixes to make your experience more stable and reliable.
features: New statistics dashboard shows your messaging patterns and time saved
Scheduled messages now include more options and improvements
Group chat messages now display contact names for easier conversation tracking
Clickable links in messages make it easy to open websites directly
Improved onboarding flow with restore tutorial for returning users
fixes: Fixed long loading times when opening the app
Resolved issue where chats wouldn't appear in some cases
Fixed missing chat threads so all your conversations stay visible
Improved search panel animations and stability
Fixed "Launch at Login" toggle to properly reflect changes
Resolved issue preventing unghosting contacts
Fixed floating window to stop typing when switching conversations
Improved AI reply generation for new users with fewer conversations
Fixed potential crashes when searching messages
Smoother streaming responses with better character timing

title: Group Chats & Stability Improvements
description: We've squashed a bunch of bugs affecting group chats and made RPLY more reliable than ever. This update focuses on fixing issues you've reported with contact names, conversations not appearing, and Reply Assistant working better with your group messages.
features: Conversations are now marked as read immediately when you send a message
New updater banner to keep you informed about the latest RPLY features
Refreshed Settings interface with improved design and readability
fixes: Fixed contact names missing in group chat messages
Fixed group chat names showing incorrectly in Reply Assistant
Fixed some conversations not appearing when receiving new messages
Fixed Reply Assistant Instant Send now properly checks permissions before sending
Fixed info buttons in General Settings now respond correctly
Fixed Recent Actions button and table are now readable
Fixed search functionality issues
Fixed onboarding accessibility dialogue now appears in front of the onboarding window
Fixed floating window date display accuracy
Fixed scheduled message senders loading correctly
